title: Ruin
description: Minecraft with structures carefully chosen for the best and newest survival experience possible! Tested in Hardcore Survival! Latest Version 1.20.1!
body: Ruin is full of mods that meaningfully add more structures, mobs, terrain changes, biomes, and changes to existing content without making things too foreign to players to become familiar with. Additionally, some mods like Stellarity and neutral mobs have been added to increase game difficulty since Minecraft has been out for more than a decade now. Enjoy Ruin, all on the latest version 1.20.1!
